title: hymenophyllum ringens
intro: Hymenophyllum ringens, also known as the hanging hair fern, is a small, epiphytic fern native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum ringens include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Hymenophyllum ringens can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
